business.name: Roof Monsters
business.description: Family-owned Tampa Bay roofing contractor since 1988. Roof repair, replacement, inspections, storm damage, gutters, and skylights across Pasco, Pinellas, Hernando, Hillsborough, and Manatee County, FL.

services.name: Comprehensive Roof Installations
services.description: Expert residential and commercial roof installation using premium Atlas shingles and proven Florida installation methods.

services.name: Expert Roof Repairs and Maintenance
services.description: Roof leak repair, flashing fixes, and preventative maintenance for Tampa Bay properties.

services.name: Free Roof Inspections and Consultations
services.description: No-cost roof inspections with honest recommendations for repair or replacement.

services.name: Storm Damage Repair Specialists
services.description: Emergency tarping, storm damage assessment, and permanent private-pay repairs after Florida storms.

services.name: Gutter Installation and Cleaning
services.description: Professional gutter installation and cleaning to protect roofs and foundations.

services.name: Skylight Installation and Repair
services.description: Skylight installation and repair for natural light without compromising watertight performance.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.description: Full roof replacement across Tampa Bay with Atlas shingles, clear written estimates, and a 15-year workmanship warranty.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.description: Targeted roof repair for leaks, missing shingles, flashing failures, and storm wear on Tampa Bay homes and businesses.

services.name: Emergency Roof Repair
services.description: 24/7 emergency roof repair and tarping for active leaks and storm damage — private-pay response from Dunedin-based crews.

services.name: Roof Leak Repair
services.description: Find and fix roof leaks at valleys, flashings, penetrations, and worn shingles before water damages your interior.

services.name: Residential Roofing
services.description: Family-owned residential roofing — installations, repairs, and inspections for Tampa Bay homeowners since 1988.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.description: Commercial roofing for Tampa Bay properties including flat and TPO systems, repairs, and planned replacements.

services.name: Shingle Roofing
services.description: Atlas Designer Shingle roofing with Scotchgard protection on qualifying Tampa Bay installs.

services.name: Metal Roofing
services.description: Metal roofing installation and repair for Florida homes and buildings that need long-term wind and heat performance.

services.name: Tile Roofing
services.description: Tile roof repair and replacement for Tampa Bay properties that need durable, coastal-ready tile systems.

services.name: Flat Roofing
services.description: Flat roof and low-slope roofing for Tampa Bay homes and commercial buildings, including TPO options.

services.name: TPO Roofing
services.description: TPO roofing for Florida commercial and low-slope buildings — reflective, durable, and built for heat and storms.

services.name: Roof Maintenance
services.description: Preventative roof maintenance and seasonal checkups to extend roof life in Florida's sun and storm climate.

services.name: Roof Ventilation
services.description: Roof ventilation upgrades that reduce attic heat and moisture — protecting shingles and improving comfort.
